testcase.name: test_get_books

failure.message:
assert 'who_is_it_for' in {'amazon_link': 'https://amazon.com', 'author': 'Jim Collins', 'created_at': '2026-02-26T23:34:26.380337+00:00', 'description': "Why some companies make the leap and others don't. A landmark study revealing what it takes to transform a good company into one that produces sustained great results.

Why some companies make the leap and others don't. A landmark study revealing what it takes to transform a good company into one that produces sustained great results.

Why some companies make the leap and others don't. A landmark study revealing what it takes to transform a good company into one that produces sustained great results.

Why some companies make the leap and others don't. A landmark study revealing what it takes to transform a good company into one that produces sustained great results.", ...}

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_phase2_apis.py:412: in test_get_books
    assert "who_is_it_for" in book
E   assert 'who_is_it_for' in {'amazon_link': 'https://amazon.com', 'author': 'Jim Collins', 'created_at': '2026-02-26T23:34:26.380337+00:00', 'description': "Why some companies make the leap and others don't.
